name: volt
description: Nemotron 120B inference agent on nemoclaw-01 (VM 108). Local LLM inference via NVIDIA NIM API. Used for privacy-sensitive tasks, high-volume generation, and NemoClaw sandbox experiments.

skills.name: Text Generation
skills.description: Generate text completions with the local Nemotron 120B model

skills.name: Code Generation
skills.description: Generate and complete code snippets using local inference

skills.name: Summarization
skills.description: Summarize long documents or conversation histories locally

skills.name: Classification
skills.description: Classify text or tasks using local inference (no data leaves the lab)

skills.name: Privacy-Sensitive Inference
skills.description: Handle tasks containing PII or sensitive data that must not leave the homelab

nimBearer.description: NVIDIA NIM API key — see credentials table
